MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-02-2021 IN 206, ATTORNEY BRITTANY ROGERS APPEARED TELEPHONICALLY THROUGH COURTCALL FOR PLAINTIFF. ATTORNEY MICHAEL CHAMBERS APPEARED TELEPHONICALLY THROUGH COURTCALL FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY. JUDGE FENG DISCLOSED THE EXTENT OF HIS ACQAUINTANCE WITH ATTORNEY MICHAEL CHAMBERS. THERE BEING NO OBJECTION AFTER THE DISCLOSURE, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL WAS HEARD. NO COURTESY COPIES WERE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT. PARTIES WILL POST A NEW $60.00 MOTION FEE TO AVOID THIS MOTION GOING OFF CALENDAR AND TO BE RENOTICED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL WAS GRANTED PER STIPULATION. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE IS VACATED AND RE-SET TO 8/24/2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES AND DISCOVERY IS ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. NOTICE WAIVED BY ALL PARTIES. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
